inputs.label: Hide Weight
inputs.businessContext: Weight of raw hides to be tanned.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight of raw hides to be tanned.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids des peaux brutes à tanner

inputs.label: Desired Cr₂O₃ Offer
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of Cr₂O₃ on hide weight, typically 6-8% for chrome tanning.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of Cr₂O₃ on hide weight, typically 6-8% for chrome tanning.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Deri ağırlığına göre Cr₂O₃ yüzdesi, krom tabaklama için tipik olarak %6-8.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz von Cr₂O₃ bezogen auf das Hautgewicht, typischerweise 6-8% für Chromgerbung
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de Cr₂O₃ sur le poids de la peau, généralement 6-8 % pour le tannage au chrome

inputs.label: BCS Cr₂O₃ Content
inputs.businessContext: Chromium oxide content in basic chromium sulfate powder, typically 25-26%.

businessContext_i18n.en: Chromium oxide content in basic chromium sulfate powder, typically 25-26%.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bazik krom sülfat tozundaki krom oksit içeriği, tipik olarak %25-26.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Teneur en oxyde de chrome dans la poudre de sulfate basique de chrome, généralement 25-26 %

inputs.label: Float Volume
inputs.businessContext: Volume of float (water) used for tanning, often 200-300% on hide weight.

businessContext_i18n.en: Volume of float (water) used for tanning, often 200-300% on hide weight.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tabaklama için kullanılan flot (su) hacmi, genellikle deri ağırlığının %200-300'ü.
businessContext_i18n.de: Volumen der Flotte (Wasser) für die Gerbung, oft 200-300% des Hautgewichts
businessContext_i18n.fr: Volume de flotte (eau) utilisé pour le tannage, souvent 200-300 % du poids de la peau

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
